mnemonics: 'Pandas' eats HTML for breakfast: Use pd.read_html() to consume tables and pd.DataFrame.to_html() to spit them out.
keyPoints: The pandas library is the primary tool for reading HTML tables into DataFrames using read_html().
The to_html() method of a DataFrame is used to convert it back into an HTML table string.
When reading, specify a 'match' parameter or index to accurately target the specific table you need from a page with multiple tables.
commonMistakes: Assuming pd.read_html() will perfectly parse any website's complex HTML layout; it is designed for well-formed <table> tags.
Forgetting to set the index=False parameter in to_html() to avoid writing the DataFrame's index as an extra column.
